step_description: Statistics update history correlated with query regression
narrative_hint: Root cause confirmed. AUTO_UPDATE_STATS updated IX_Orders_Status_Date at 02:14:08 — exactly 24 seconds before the bad plan 8891 was compiled at 02:14:22. The statistics sampled only 420,000 rows out of 42,000,000 (1% sampling rate) which is the default for large tables. With 8.4 million row modifications since the last update, the 1% sample produced an inaccurate histogram that caused the cardinality estimate to drop from 8,418 to 1. The fix is two-pronged: (1) force plan 8420 immediately for relief, (2) rebuild statistics with FULLSCAN or higher sampling rate and consider sp_autostats to prevent recurrence. Claude should provide both the immediate fix and the permanent fix.
